# cycloid_plugin_registry (Data Source)

Look up a plugin registry by name or URL within an organization.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The display name of the plugin registry to look up. Mutually exclusive with `url`.
- `organization` (String) The organization canonical, defaults to the provider `default_organization`.
- `url` (String) The URL of the plugin registry to look up. Mutually exclusive with `name`.

### Read-Only

- `access` (Boolean) Whether you have access to create plugins in this registry.
- `created_at` (Number) Unix timestamp of registry creation.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the plugin registry.
- `status` (String) Connection status of the registry: `offline` or `connected`.
- `updated_at` (Number) Unix timestamp of last registry update.
